title: Ubiquiti UACC-OM-QSFP28-PSM4 - Optical module, Single-Mode, 100 Gbps, MPO-12 APC
description: An optical module operating at speeds of up to 100 Gb/s . The module is compatible with QSFP28 and QSFP+ interfaces. It works in Single-mode and ensures a range of up to 2 km Data transfer rate up to 100 Gb/s Range of up to 2 km Single-mode MPO-12 Type B APC connector
specsSearch: Optics Format QSFP28 For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 100 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1310 Distance [km] 2 Transfer type 12-fiber Polishing type APC Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors MPO Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 70
